LanguageData.Ammo_9mm_Reprimand_FMJ.label: 9mm Reprimand (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_9mm_Reprimand_FMJ.description: Standard 9mm pistol cartridge for the Doberkin Federation Reprimand SMG. High fire rate, moderate penetration.
LanguageData.Bullet_CE_9mm_Reprimand_FMJ.label: 9mm Reprimand (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_9mm_Reprimand_AP.label: 9mm Reprimand (AP)
LanguageData.Ammo_9mm_Reprimand_AP.description: 9mm hardened steel-core round for the Reprimand. Effective against lightly armored targets.
LanguageData.Bullet_CE_9mm_Reprimand_AP.label: 9mm Reprimand (AP)
LanguageData.Ammo_12ga_Cluster_Buckshot.label: 12 gauger Cluster (buckshot)
LanguageData.Ammo_12ga_Cluster_Buckshot.description: Reinforced buckshot shell for the Cluster shotgun. Ten pellets per shot in a controlled spread.
LanguageData.Bullet_CE_12ga_Buckshot.label: 12 gauger Cluster (buckshot)
LanguageData.Ammo_12ga_Cluster_Slug.label: 12 gauger Cluster (slug)
LanguageData.Ammo_12ga_Cluster_Slug.description: Single-projectile slug round for the Cluster. Trades spread for better penetration and range.
LanguageData.Bullet_CE_12ga_Slug.label: 12 gauger Cluster (slug)
LanguageData.Ammo_45_Comrade_FMJ.label: .45 Comrade Arms (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_45_Comrade_FMJ.description: Large-caliber .45 cartridge for the Doberkin Federation Comrade Arms pistol. Strong stopping power, moderate penetration.
LanguageData.Bullet_CE_45_Comrade_FMJ.label: .45 Comrade Arms (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_45_Comrade_HP.label: .45 Comrade Arms (HP)
LanguageData.Ammo_45_Comrade_HP.description: Hollow-point round for the Comrade Arms. Excellent tissue damage, limited armor penetration.
LanguageData.Bullet_CE_45_Comrade_HP.label: .45 Comrade Arms (HP)
LanguageData.Ammo_20mm_Breaker_FMJ.label: 20mm Breaker (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_20mm_Breaker_FMJ.description: Standard 20mm FMJ ammunition for the Breaker platform.
LanguageData.Bullet_CE_20mm_Breaker_FMJ.label: 20mm Breaker (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_20mm_Breaker_AP.label: 20mm Breaker (AP)
LanguageData.Ammo_20mm_Breaker_AP.description: Armor-piercing 20mm round for the Breaker platform. Designed to defeat hardened protection.
LanguageData.Bullet_CE_20mm_Breaker_AP.label: 20mm Breaker (AP)
LanguageData.Ammo_20mm_MaulerMG_FMJ.label: 20mm Mauler MG (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_20mm_MaulerMG_FMJ.description: Standard 20mm FMJ ammunition for the Mauler MG.
LanguageData.Bullet_CE_20mm_MaulerMG_FMJ.label: 20mm Mauler MG (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_20mm_MaulerMG_AP.label: 20mm Mauler MG (AP)
LanguageData.Ammo_20mm_MaulerMG_AP.description: Armor-piercing 20mm ammunition for the Mauler MG.
LanguageData.Bullet_CE_20mm_MaulerMG_AP.label: 20mm Mauler MG (AP)
LanguageData.Ammo_20mm_ATRifle_AP.label: 20mm AT Rifle (AP)
LanguageData.Bullet_CE_20mm_ATRifle_AP.label: 20mm AT Rifle (AP)
LanguageData.Ammo_20mm_ATRifle_APHE.label: 20mm AT Rifle (AP-HE)
LanguageData.Bullet_CE_20mm_ATRifle_APHE.label: 20mm AT Rifle (AP-HE)
LanguageData.Ammo_EnergyCell_Doberkin_Standard.label: Doberkin energy cell (standard)
LanguageData.Ammo_EnergyCell_Doberkin_Standard.descri: Standard Doberkin energy cell for directed-energy weapons.
LanguageData.Ammo_EnergyCell_Doberkin_Overcharge.desc: Overcharged Doberkin energy cell delivering a stronger but more demanding beam.
LanguageData.Ammo_700Smart_CS_Standard.label: .700 Smart Sidearm (standard)
LanguageData.Ammo_700Smart_CS_Standard.description: Standard smart-guided .700 ammunition for the Smart Sidearm.
LanguageData.Bullet_CE_700Smart_CS_Standard.label: .700 Smart Sidearm
LanguageData.Ammo_HMG_Smart_FMJ.label: Smart HMG (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_HMG_Smart_FMJ.description: Smart-guided FMJ ammunition for heavy machine gun platforms.
LanguageData.Bullet_CE_HMG_Smart_FMJ.label: Smart HMG
LanguageData.Ammo_LancerCell_Standard.label: Lancer cell (standard)
LanguageData.Ammo_LancerCell_Standard.description: High-output energy cell for Lancer-pattern weapon systems.
LanguageData.Bullet_CE_LancerCell_Standard.label: Lancer beam
LanguageData.Ammo_RedGlare_HE.label: Red Glare grenade (HE)
LanguageData.Grenade_CE_RedGlare_HE.label: Red Glare grenade
LanguageData.Ammo_RedGlare_Frag.label: Red Glare grenade (frag)
LanguageData.Grenade_CE_RedGlare_Frag.label: Red Glare grenade (fragmentation)
